spec.name: The Lion Pit
spec.description: As you land at the bottom of this dirt-walled pit, the realization that a pit full of lions is NOT a good thing to be hanging around in. Several of the gladiators gather around the edge of the pit to watch your demise. You look around you, and all you see is tawny fur and gaping jaws... it is too late to run, too late to hide. Twelve lions rip you and your belongings into a gory mass of bloodied leather, bronze, and bone. What's that old saying? Cats killed the curious? Something like that, I'm sure...
